zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Bar於1118年9月29日出生在法國時，她的父親Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar41歲，母親Gisèle de Vaudémont29歲。她於1140年與Albert Ier de Chiny在法國德 艾斯特姆斯布拉班特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1185年在比利時盧布格尼享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Bar于1118年9月29日出生在法国时，她的父亲Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar41岁，母亲Gisèle de Vaudémont29岁。她于1140年与Albert Ier de Chiny在法国德 艾斯特姆斯布拉班特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1185年在比利时盧布格尼享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Bar was born on 29 September 1118, in France, her father, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, was 41 and her mother, Gisèle de Vaudémont, was 29. She married Albert Ier de Chiny in 1140, in Brabant, Meuse, Grand Est, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1185, in Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgium, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Bar est née le 29 septembre 1118, à France, son père, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de Vaudémont, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Albert Ier de Chiny en 1140, à Brabant, Meuse, Grand Est, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1185, à Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgique, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Bar am 29. September 1118 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar 41 und ihre Mutter Gisèle de Vaudémont 29. Sie hat 1140 in Brabant, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich Albert Ier de Chiny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1185 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Chiny, Luxemburg, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Bar è nata il il 29 settembre 1118 nel Francia, sua padre, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Gisèle de Vaudémont, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Albert Ier de Chiny nel 1140, nel Brabant, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1185, nel Chiny, Lussemburgo, Belgio, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Barが1118年9月29日にフランスで生まれた時，父Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Barは41歳，母Gisèle de Vaudémontは29歳であった。1140年にフランスグランド エストメウゼブラバントでAlbert Ier de Chinyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1185年にベルギールクセンボウルグチニーで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Bar(이)가 1118년 9월 29일 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gisèle de Vaudémont(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1140년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 브라반트에서 Albert Ier de Chiny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 벨기에 루세보우르그 친이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Bar nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1118, em França, seu pai, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Albert Ier de Chiny em 1140, em Brabant, Meuse, Grand Est, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1185, em Chiny, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Bar родилась 29 сентября 1118 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de Vaudémont, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albert Ier de Chiny в 1140 г. в местности брабант, меус, гранд эст, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1185 г. в местности чини, луксембург, Бельгия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Bar nació el 29 de septiembre de 1118, en Francia, su papá, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Albert Ier de Chiny en 1140, en Brabant, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1185, en Chiny, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, a la edad de 67 años.
